name: IdsEdwEntyInsurDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MyInput AS (SELECT EI.ENTY_INSUR_SK,EI.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,EI.ENTY_ID,EI.INSUR_SEQ_NO,EI.CMN_PRCT_SK,EI.PROV_SK,EI.CMN_PRCT_IN,EI.EXCESS_LMT_AGG_AMT,EI.EXCESS_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT,EI.COV_RETROACTV_DT_SK,EI.COV_STRT_DT_SK,EI.COV_TERM_DT_SK,EI.COV_TYP_DESC,EI.INSUR_CO_NM,EI.LOCAL_CAR_NM,EI.POL_NO,EI.PRI_LMT_AGG_AMT,EI.PRI_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT,COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.ENTY_INSUR EI LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON EI.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CM.CD_MPPNG_SK), BusinessLogic AS (SELECT ENTY_INSUR_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, ENTY_ID, INSUR_SEQ_NO AS ENTY_INSUR_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMN_PRCT_SK, PROV_SK, CMN_PRCT_IN, EXCESS_LMT_AGG_AMT AS ENTY_INSUR_EXCESS_LMT_AGG_AMT, EXCESS_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT AS ENTY_INSUR_EXCESS_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT, COV_RETROACTV_DT_SK AS ENTY_INSUR_COV_RETROACTV_DT_SK, COV_STRT_DT_SK AS ENTY_INSUR_COV_STRT_DT_SK, COV_TERM_DT_SK AS ENTY_INSUR_COV_TERM_DT_SK, COV_TYP_DESC AS ENTY_INSUR_COV_TYP_DESC, INSUR_CO_NM AS ENTY_INSUR_INSUR_CO_NM, LOCAL_CAR_NM AS ENTY_INSUR_LOCAL_CAR_NM, POL_NO AS ENTY_INSUR_POL_NO, PRI_LMT_AGG_AMT AS ENTY_INSUR_PRI_LMT_AGG_AMT, PRI_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT AS ENTY_INSUR_PRI_LMT_PER_CLM_AMT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM MyInput) SELECT * FROM BusinessLogic

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwEntyInsurDExtr
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS tables ENTY_INSUR
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as ENTY_INSUR_D.dat
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
